sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Travelzoo Recognised with Three Gold Awards at the Canadian Online Publishing Awards: All You Need To Know
feed.summary: Travelzoo won three Gold Awards at the 17th Canadian Online Publishing Awards (COPAs), establishing itself as a leader in online travel media. The company was recognized for its "Top 20" newsletter and received awards for Best Travel Story and Best Photojournalism for its "Malta Moved Me" feature. This achievement highlights Travelzoo's consistent delivery of high-quality content and exclusive travel deals to its 30 million members.

feed.title: Avery Dennison Corp. Stock (ISIN: US0536111091) Faces Headwinds Amid Proxy Highlights and Mixed Q1 Outlook
feed.summary: Avery Dennison Corp. stock (ISIN: US0536111091) experienced a 1.23% dip despite a resilient 2025 performance highlighted in its 2026 proxy statement, which detailed $8.9 billion in net sales. The company faces headwinds from tariffs and softer volumes, with Q1 2026 EPS guidance set between $2.40-$2.46. While technical analysis points to a potential short-term rebound, investors are watching for confirmation of volume stabilization and the company's progress towards its 2028 growth targets.

feed.title: Philip Morris vs. British American Tobacco: Which Tobacco Giant Wins for Income Investors?
feed.summary: This article compares Philip Morris International (PM) and British American Tobacco (BTI) for income investors, highlighting their recent full-year 2025 results. Philip Morris demonstrates strong growth in smoke-free products, commanding a higher valuation due to consistent earnings, while British American Tobacco offers a higher dividend yield and lower valuation despite a more volatile earnings history. The choice between the two depends on whether an investor prioritizes growth and consistent earnings or pure yield and a cheaper valuation.

feed.title: Globe Life Inc Stock (ISIN: US37959E1029) Faces Fiduciary Duty Probe as Investors Scrutinize Governance
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL) is facing a fiduciary duty probe by investor rights firm Halper Sadeh LLC, raising concerns about corporate governance. This investigation, announced on March 12, 2026, could impact investor confidence and potentially lead to demands for governance reforms or financial recoveries. The situation prompts caution for both US and European investors, especially those monitoring US insurers for yield and diversification.

feed.title: News | RTX's Raytheon completes $115 million expansion of Alabama missile integration facility
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has completed a $115 million, 26,000 square-foot expansion of its Redstone Missile Integration Facility in Huntsville, Alabama. This expansion will increase the facility's integration and delivery capacity by over 50% and solidify Raytheon's commitment to meeting the growing demand for critical munitions. This investment also boosts the local economy and strengthens national defense capabilities.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Price Target on Camden Property Trust to $119 From $123, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for Camden Property Trust (CPT) to $119, down from $123, while maintaining an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a recent series of analyst target changes for the residential REIT, with other firms like JPMorgan, Barclays, and Scotiabank also revising their targets. Camden Property Trust specializes in the ownership, development, and management of residential real estate assets, with a portfolio of 172 residential units in the United States as of late 2025.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty shares slide on disappointing guidance
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty's shares dropped after the company issued weaker-than-expected guidance for fiscal 2026, despite strong fourth-quarter results that surpassed Wall Street estimates. The conservative outlook is attributed to competitive pressures, inflationary costs, and more selective consumer spending on discretionary beauty items. Ulta Beauty still sees itself well-positioned for sustainable, profitable growth.

feed.title: Dow Inc. Jumps 9.3% on Citigroup Upgrade and Oil Price Surge, but Earnings Outlook Remains Weak
authors: MLQ Agent · partner Zacks Investment Research
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) shares surged 9.3% after a Citigroup upgrade to Buy with a $40 price target and a rise in oil prices due to Middle East tensions. Despite this rally, the company faces a challenging fundamental outlook with projected quarterly losses and declining revenues, and analysts have lowered EPS estimates. The sustained impact of these macro tailwinds against the weak earnings forecast will be tested in the upcoming quarterly report.

feed.title: Form 3] Ternium S.A. Initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership
feed.summary: Ternium S.A. (TX) officer Renato Catallini, who serves as Ternium Argentina President, has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership on Form 3. This filing indicates Catallini's status as a reporting person for future insider activity but does not report any current transactions or specific share holdings. The document confirms that no securities are beneficially owned at the time of this initial report.

feed.title: Prairieville Neighborhood Walmart to temporarily close
feed.summary: The Walmart Neighborhood Market at 15047 Airline Hwy in Prairieville, La., will temporarily close for four weeks starting April 6 for a rapid remodel. The renovation aims to enhance the shopping experience with a fresh look, expanded aisles, and upgrades for online grocery services and pharmacies. During the closure, the pharmacy and fuel station will remain open, and other Walmart locations in Prairieville will continue to operate.

feed.title: Aflac Inc: Lake Charles D II sells $1.7m in stock
feed.summary: Lake Charles D II, Chairman & Rep. Director of Aflac Inc (NYSE:AFL), sold 15,590 shares of common stock for $109.93 per share, totaling over $1.7 million. Following this transaction, Lake Charles D II directly holds 62,237 shares and indirectly 1,327 shares. Aflac has a history of 42 consecutive dividend increases and is trading near its fair value according to InvestingPro analysis, despite recent mixed Q4 2025 earnings and a maintained "Underperform" rating from Mizuho.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Cruises tops growth factor grades among S&P consumer discretionary holdings (RCL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) has received top growth factor grades among S&P consumer discretionary holdings, indicating strong growth prospects despite recent market challenges impacting the S&P 500. Other companies with high growth grades include Realty Income, Tesla, Amazon, and Booking Holdings. The growth factor grade system ranges from A+ to F, with B- or higher being a "Buy" and D+ or below a "Sell," reflecting the quantitative growth prospects and business expansion ability of a company.

feed.title: A Look At NRG Energy (NRG) Valuation After Leadership Change And Multibillion Dollar Equity Offering
feed.summary: NRG Energy recently appointed a new Chief Growth and Policy Officer, Caroline Golin, and completed a US$2.35 billion equity offering. The stock has shown strong long-term momentum but has cooled off in recent months. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests NRG is undervalued with a fair value of $202.85, although its high P/E ratio compared to the industry and peers poses a potential risk if earnings don't meet optimistic forecasts.

feed.title: Kroger Brings Zepbound® KwikPen to Retail Pharmacy, Expanding Access and Savings for Self-Pay Patients
feed.summary: The Kroger Co. announced that its pharmacies will now offer Zepbound® KwikPen, a multi-dose delivery option for Eli Lilly's weight-management medication, to expand access for patients. This initiative allows self-pay patients to potentially qualify for Lilly's savings program at retail pharmacy locations for the first time. Kroger pharmacies will also provide comprehensive support services, including pharmacist counseling, virtual nutrition care, and integrated health services, to aid patients on their weight management journey.

feed.title: New Zepbound weight-loss pen at Kroger aims to cut self-pay costs
feed.summary: Kroger announced that Zepbound KwikPen, Eli Lilly's multi-dose GLP-1 weight-management pen, is now available at participating Kroger pharmacies. This development allows eligible self-pay patients to access Lilly's KwikPen savings program at retail pharmacy locations for the first time. Kroger pharmacists and dietitians will also offer support services like adherence counseling and virtual nutrition care to patients.

feed.title: Sema4.ai Announces Semantic Layer Capabilities at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026
feed.summary: Sema4.ai has unveiled its Semantic Layer capabilities at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026, revolutionizing how AI agents interact with enterprise data. This innovation allows business users to query structured and unstructured data, including databases, documents, and spreadsheets, using natural language without requiring SQL expertise. The new Semantic Layer aims to democratize data access, eliminate bottlenecks, and provide mathematically accurate analysis across diverse data sources.

feed.title: Strong 2025 results and pay plans detailed in Univest Financial (NASDAQ: UVSP) 2026 proxy
feed.summary: The Univest Financial 2026 proxy statement details the company's strong 2025 financial performance, including significant growth in diluted earnings per share, return on assets, and tangible book value. It also outlines the executive compensation structure, which is heavily performance-based, with specific targets for annual incentives and long-term equity awards. Shareholders are asked to vote on the election of directors, ratification of KPMG LLP as auditor, and a non-binding say-on-pay proposal at the upcoming April 23, 2026 annual meeting.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Valuation Check After Strong 48.1% Three Month Share Price Return
feed.summary: Western Digital's stock has seen a significant 48.1% return over the past three months, prompting a valuation check. While one common narrative suggests the stock is 18.6% undervalued with a fair value of $321 per share due to AI storage demand, a discounted cash flow model indicates it's fairly priced at around $257 per share. Investors are encouraged to review the underlying data and market narratives to determine the actual value and risks associated with WDC.

feed.title: Metro Detroit power outages: How to check the DTE map as high winds blow through area
feed.summary: Metro Detroit is experiencing widespread power outages as a High Wind Warning is in effect across Southeast Michigan until late Friday. Wind gusts are expected to reach 50-60 mph, and as of Friday morning, over 13,000 DTE customers are without power. The article advises residents on checking the DTE outage map and provides critical safety instructions for dealing with downed power lines.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Phillips 66 (PSX) After Its Strong Multi Year Rally
feed.summary: This article analyzes Phillips 66 (PSX) after its significant multi-year rally, assessing whether its current share price of US$174 still offers value. Using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio analyses, the article concludes that PSX appears undervalued. It also presents contrasting "Bull" and "Bear" narratives from the Simply Wall St Community, highlighting different perspectives on the stock's fair value.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Diamondback Energy to $190 From $185, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (FANG) to $190 from $185, while retaining an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the analyst's updated outlook for the oil and gas exploration and production company. Diamondback Energy specializes in crude oil, liquefied natural gas, and natural gas production, with all net sales from the United States.

feed.title: Americas Gold and Silver Announces Largest Ever Exploration Program in 2026 Following the Discovery of Ten New High-Grade Silver-Copper-Antimony and Silver-Lead Veins at Galena Including 4,896 g/t Silver and 3.95% Copper over 1.3M
feed.summary: Americas Gold and Silver Corporation has announced the discovery of ten new high-grade silver-copper-antimony and silver-lead veins at its Galena Complex, with drill results showing impressive grades such as 4,896 g/t Ag and 3.95% Cu over 1.3 meters. Following these discoveries, the company plans its largest-ever exploration drilling campaign in 2026, totaling approximately 64,000 meters across its Idaho and Mexico operations. This aggressive drilling program aims to capitalize on the high-grade potential of the Galena Complex and the recently acquired Crescent Mine, reinforcing Americas' position as a growing North American precious metals and antimony producer.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts ConocoPhillips PT to $128 From $118, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has adjusted its price target for ConocoPhillips (COP) to $128, an increase from the previous $118, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This update reflects Barclays' continued positive outlook on the oil and gas exploration and production company. The article also provides a brief overview of ConocoPhillips' business segments, including its production breakdown of crude oil, natural gas, and liquefied natural gas.

feed.title: Micron Likely to Beat Q2 Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy the Stock?
feed.summary: Micron Technology (MU) is expected to beat its second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings estimates due to robust demand for memory chips driven by AI and improving supply-demand dynamics in the market. The company shows strong growth, outperforming competitors, and its stock is considered a strong buy given its valuation, strong fundamentals, and strategic positioning in transformative tech trends.

feed.title: Schwab Forecasts Revenue Growth of 16% for the First Quarter
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. anticipates a 16% revenue growth for the first quarter, driven by sustained retail investor engagement despite economic uncertainties and the conflict in the Middle East. This short-term projection surpasses the full-year forecast of 9.5% to 10.5% provided in January, even as trading volumes have slightly declined from 2025's record figures.

feed.title: VinFast Auto Ltd expected to post a loss of 36 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: VinFast Auto Ltd is anticipated to report a loss of 36 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv earnings preview. The report also mentions the company's stock symbol, VFS, and notes its connection to Vietnamese stocks.

feed.title: McDonald's Corporation Stock (ISIN: US5801351017) Faces Short-Term Headwinds Amid Mixed Signals
feed.summary: McDonald's Corporation stock is showing resilience in pre-market trading but analysts are warning of potential short-term declines, with technical forecasts suggesting an 8.39% drop over the next three months. Despite strong quarterly revenue growth, a negative return on equity due to balance sheet dynamics or buyback programs raises questions for investors, particularly those in the DACH region. The company's robust franchise model and dividend-aristocrat status continue to make it an attractive long-term holding, though short-term caution is advised.

feed.title: KION GROUP AG: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: KION GROUP AG announced a major holdings notification reflecting BlackRock, Inc.'s acquisition/disposal of shares with voting rights. BlackRock, Inc. reached a total of 3.39% of KION GROUP AG's voting rights as of March 10, 2026, through both direct shareholdings and financial instruments. The notification provides a detailed breakdown of BlackRock's holdings and the chain of controlled undertakings.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Two-time Olympic Champions Have a Bell Moment on the Trading Floor
feed.summary: The NYSE provided a daily pre-market update, highlighting U.S. stock market indices tracking for weekly losses due to rising ICE Brent Crude oil prices amidst conflict in Iran. The update also featured appearances by Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company CIO Sean Bill, rugby executive Alan Gilpin, and retired player Naya Tapper, alongside Olympic figure skaters Madison Chock and Evan Bates who enjoyed a NYSE Bell Moment. The Closing Bell was rung by EltaMD Skin Care, a Colgate-Palmolive brand, in recognition of National Dermatologist Day.

feed.title: URC.TO pre-market: Uranium Royalty earnings 18 Mar 2026 could support CAD 6.14
feed.summary: Uranium Royalty Corp. (URC.TO) is trading at CAD 5.30 in pre-market ahead of its earnings release on March 18, 2026. Meyka AI projects a yearly price of CAD 6.14, implying a 15.94% upside, assigning a "HOLD" rating due to strong balance-sheet metrics and sector exposure, despite high earnings multiples. Investors will watch for updates on royalty receipts, physical uranium sales, and operating cash flow per share.

feed.title: INTEL CORP : Bernstein gives a Neutral rating
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst James Hooper has maintained a Neutral rating for Intel Corp, setting a target price of USD 36. Intel Corporation specializes in semiconductor manufacturing, with products including processors, graphics cards, and connectivity solutions. The company's revenue is primarily derived from computing architectures and wafer manufacturing services, with a significant presence across various global markets.

feed.title: Stifel reiterates Hold on Revvity stock, keeps $110 price target
feed.summary: Stifel maintained a Hold rating on Revvity Inc (NYSE:RVTY) with a $110.00 price target after a non-deal roadshow with management. While management expressed cautious optimism regarding certain end markets and stronger portfolio segments, they expect pharmaceutical and biotech growth to remain in the low single-digit range for 2026. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week low and appears undervalued, suggesting potential upside if macroeconomic conditions or biotech funding accelerate.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Increases Quarterly Dividend by 1.9%
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) has announced a 1.9% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $0.53 per share, marking the first increase in four quarters. The company, a leading player in the household and personal care industry with a strong international presence, demonstrates robust financial health with consistent revenue growth and profitability. This dividend increase reflects its commitment to shareholder value, supported by a solid financial foundation despite some insider selling activity.

feed.title: Travelers Q1 Results Due April 16 as Insurance Giant Signals Strength Ahead
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 results on April 16, with shares trading near 52-week highs, driven by investor optimism and the company's advancements in AI. The company has demonstrated resilience with strong recent share performance, disciplined capital allocation, and strategic AI integration through partnerships with OpenAI and Anthropic to improve operational efficiency and customer experience. Investors will be looking for premium growth, combined ratio trends, and management commentary on competitive dynamics during the upcoming earnings call.

feed.title: Travelers Schedules Conference Call to Review First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) announced it will review its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 16, at 9:30 a.m. ET. Investors can access the conference call via webcast on the company's investor relations website or by dialing in. Replays of the event will be available for one year online and for seven days by telephone.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Recognized by Newsweek as One of “America’s Greatest Workplaces for Women” for the Fourth Consecutive Year
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. has been named one of "America’s Greatest Workplaces for Women 2026" by Newsweek for the fourth consecutive year. This recognition is based on extensive employee surveys and an evaluation of workplace satisfaction factors, including work-life balance and compensation. Ameriprise's Executive Vice President of Human Resources, Kelli Hunter Petruzillo, emphasized the company's commitment to creating a supportive culture for its employees and advisors.

feed.title: AES Corp Stock (ISIN: US00130H1059) Nears Take-Private Deadline as Bond Consent Extended Amid $10.7B Deal
feed.summary: AES Corp is nearing a critical deadline for bond consent related to its $10.7 billion take-private acquisition by GIP and EQT, with the deadline extended to today, March 13, 2026. The deal, offering $15 per share, aims to transition AES to private ownership, allowing a greater focus on long-term renewable energy projects without public market pressures. Analysts have shifted ratings in response to the impending deal, with the stock currently trading below the offer price due to typical acquisition uncertainties.

feed.title: Voyager Acquisition Corp. Secures Shareholder Approval for VERAXA Biotech Merger
feed.summary: Voyager Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: VACHU, VACH, VACHW) has received shareholder approval for its business combination with VERAXA Biotech AG. The combined company is expected to trade on Nasdaq under the symbol "VRXA" after closing. A significant portion of Voyager's Class A ordinary shares, approximately 99.67%, were redeemed in connection with the merger.

feed.title: ‘We’re Really Going for It Now:’ Ford Family on the Return to Formula 1
feed.summary: The Ford family is enthusiastically embracing their return to Formula 1, signaling a significant commitment to the sport. This marks a new chapter for the company in the world of high-stakes racing. The article title suggests a strong, decisive push into their Formula 1 involvement.

feed.title: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) proxy seeks board election and charter vote May 8, 2026
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) and its subsidiary Consumers Energy have filed a preliminary proxy statement for their virtual annual meetings on May 8, 2026. Shareholders will vote on electing 11 director nominees, approving executive compensation, ratifying the independent auditor, and considering charter amendments to increase authorized common shares and permit shareholder-called special meetings. The proxy highlights 2025 adjusted EPS of $3.61, a 2026 annualized dividend of $2.28, and sustainability goals including 100% clean electricity by 2040 and net-zero methane by 2030.

feed.title: Power outages possible today amid High Wind Warning in Northeast Ohio: What FirstEnergy wants you to know if electricity goes out
feed.summary: Northeast Ohio is under a High Wind Warning, prompting FirstEnergy to prepare for potential power outages due to strong winds. The utility has activated an incident command structure and is bringing in additional crews to respond to downed trees and power lines. FirstEnergy advises customers to prepare by securing loose outdoor items, charging devices, and having emergency supplies ready, also providing ways to report and monitor outages.

feed.title: Olympic ice dance stars Chock and Bates ring the NYSE bell after Milan medals
feed.summary: Olympic figure skating champions Madison Chock and Evan Bates participated in a ceremonial Bell Moment at the NYSE after winning gold and silver medals at the Milan Cortina Winter Games. The NYSE also highlighted its pre-market trading-floor update, current market drivers, and the recognition of EltaMD skin care (a Colgate-Palmolive brand) on National Dermatologist Day. ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott opened U.S. markets.

feed.title: Apollo Global Management Hits Day Low of $100.15 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: Apollo Global Management, Inc. experienced a significant 5.47% decline in its stock, reaching an intraday low of $100.15, and has seen substantial drops over the past week, month, and year. Despite these short-term price pressures, the company demonstrates strong long-term fundamentals, including a robust average Return on Equity of 25.68% and positive growth in net sales and operating profit, with a market capitalization of USD 69,488 million. The stock's performance contrasts sharply with the S&P 500's movement during the same periods.

feed.title: BBB Foods Inc.: Solid Growth and In-Line Outlook Justify Neutral ‘Hold’ Rating Amid Modest Margin Pressure
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Irma Sgarz maintained a "Hold" rating on BBB Foods Inc. Class A, keeping the price target at $34.00. The rating is based on the company's solid revenue growth driven by rapid store expansion and healthy same-store sales, but tempered by modest margin pressure from logistics expansion and overhead investments. While the company's 2026 operational plans are strong, they are consistent with existing forecasts and do not present a clear upside surprise, thus justifying a neutral stance despite robust execution.

feed.title: Walmart Appoints Next Chief Legal Officer
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. has announced the appointment of Erin Nealy Cox as its new EVP of global governance, chief legal officer, and corporate secretary, effective April 13. Cox brings a wealth of experience, including serving as U.S. Attorney for the Northern District of Texas and as a partner at Kirkland & Ellis LLP. Walmart President and CEO John Furner highlighted Cox's rare combination of legal strategy and operational rigor as essential for navigating the evolving retail landscape.

feed.title: Tenants sought for shovel-ready industrial park northwest of Austin
feed.summary: Prologis Inc. is seeking tenants for its 75-acre Northwest Depot industrial park in Cedar Park, northwest of Austin, which is now shovel-ready. The San Francisco-based firm acquired the land in 2022 from National Instruments Corp. This development highlights Cedar Park as a rapidly growing area for industrial real estate.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Occidental Petroleum to $59 From $55, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Occidental Petroleum (OXY) to $59 from $55, while reiterating an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects Barclays' updated outlook on the oil and gas company. Occidental Petroleum, a major player in hydrocarbon exploration and production, also has significant chemical manufacturing operations.

feed.title: Dentsu hires Omnicom’s Chrissie Hanson to lead US media and Carat—inside the move to sharpen its positioning
feed.summary: Dentsu has appointed Chrissie Hanson, formerly of OMD, to lead its U.S. media business and serve as Carat global brand president. This strategic hire aims to sharpen Dentsu's positioning in the market by bringing in leadership from a rival agency. The move signifies Dentsu's efforts to enhance its media capabilities in the U.S.

feed.title: L3Harris Reshapes Leadership As Investors Weigh Segment Execution And Valuation
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has reorganized its leadership by appointing Sam Mehta to head the Space & Mission Systems and Communications & Spectrum Dominance segments following a key executive's departure. This move occurs as the company prepares for a Missile Solutions spin-off and sustains strong order momentum. The consolidation aims to streamline decision-making and project progression, with investors closely watching Mehta's prioritization of programs and integration efforts.

feed.title: How to listen to Travelers’ April 16, 2026 earnings call live
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) announced it will host a conference call on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. ET to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. Investors can access the live audio broadcast, along with a slide presentation and statistical supplement, via webcast on the company's investor relations website or by dialing in. Replays will be available after the event through webcast and telephone for a limited time.
